workflow.name: KinSvarmo Analysis Execution
workflow.description: Tracks KinSvarmo analysis job execution, validates job metadata, sends an execution callback, and keeps KeeperHub run logs visible for the job status page.

data.label: KinSvarmo Job Started
data.description: Receives a KeeperHub run request from the KinSvarmo backend when a user starts an analysis job.

data.label: Validate Job Payload
data.description: Checks that jobId and agentId are present before the workflow continues.

data.label: Create KeeperHub Audit Log
data.description: Emits a log entry proving KeeperHub accepted and validated the KinSvarmo job.

data.label: Notify KinSvarmo Callback
data.description: Sends a webhook to KinSvarmo so the backend can record KeeperHub execution progress without re-starting the job.

data.label: Finalize KeeperHub Log
data.description: Returns a final KeeperHub-visible execution summary for the KinSvarmo job status page.
